_comment: Default settings for The Sundering of Aethermoor. DO NOT EDIT this file. Edit custom.json instead.

descriptions.easy: Void Corruption increases slowly. Player gains bonus HP. DC checks reduced by 2.
descriptions.normal: Balanced experience as intended by the game designers.
descriptions.hard: Void Corruption increases faster. Enemies deal +25% damage. Fewer healing items.
descriptions.nightmare: Permadeath. Void Corruption is relentless. No second chances.

descriptions.normal: Balanced narrative — enough detail to paint a vivid scene.
descriptions.verbose: Rich, immersive prose. Every location and event described in full detail.
